titleStmt.title: SII 9.135: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 135. (A.R. No. 127 of 1913.) ON A SLAB NEAR THE SOUTH WALL OF THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT HUVINA-HADAGALLI, HADAGALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 993, Sādhāraṇa, Phālguṇa, ba. 8, Śukravāra, Vyatīpāta corresponding to A.D. 1071 February 25 Friday. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva ruling from Gōvindavāḍi after the victory achieved on Daṇḍanāyaka Chiddayya. It records that Komārasvāmi-Dvēdibhaṭṭa and other Mahājanas of Pūvina-Paḍaṅgile came to the king and blessed him and that, at their request, the king made a gift of the village Koṭiganūru in Hālvoḷa twelve in the district of Kōgaḷi five-hundred for the service of the god Kalidēva of the place, for feeding the ascetics in the maṭha of Lakuḷēśvara-Paṇḍita, a descendant of Maleyāḷa-Paṇḍitadēva of Rāmēśvara and for the feeding and clothing of students, servants, and singers; the income of the granted village was divided into three parts for the above three functions. The Mahāsāmanta Ghaṭṭiyarasa made a grant of the manneyasāmya of Koṭiganūru to the same god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājāthirāja paramēśvara
paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuva
namalladēvara vijeyarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravardhdhamānamācaṁdrā
rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire gōvindavāḍiya nelevīḍinalu sukhasaṁkathā
vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire daṇḍanāyakaṁ ciddayyanaṁ jayaṁgeydu
tsāhadalirddalli Agrahāraṁ pūvinavaḍaṁgiliya komārasvāmidvēdibhaṭṭa
pramukhamāgi mahājanaṁ baṁdu ślōkārthamaṁ pērddāsīrvvādamaṁ koṭṭaḍe meccideṁ
bēḍikoḷḷivene yemmūra kalidēvasvāmidēvargge tuṁgabhadrānadiya
taṁkaṇa kōgaḷi Aynūṟara baḷiya kaṁpaṇaṁ hālvoḷaṁ panneraḍaṟo
ḷagaṇa koṭiganūraṁ sakavarṣa 993 neya sādhāraṇasaṁvatsarada phālgu
ṇa bahuḷa 8 śukravāraṁ vyatīpātadaṁdu dhārāpūrvakaṁ māḍi sa(ṁ)rvvana
masyamāgi biṭṭukoṭṭarāyūra puṭṭidartthamaṁ dēvarupabhōgakkaṁ khaṇḍa
sphuṭitajīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ mudinīratīrtthada rāmēsvarada maleyā
ḷapaṇḍitadēvara santati Īsthāna lakuḷēsvarapaṇḍitara maṭha
da tapōdhanarkka vidyārdhdhigaḷasanācchādanakkaṁ paṟekāṟarggaṁ
pātrakkaṁ pāḍuvargga(ṁ)mintu tribhāgamāgi naḍevudu
tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsā
mantaṁ vīraśrīkāntaṁ banavāsipuravarēsvaraṁ vīramāhēśvaraṁ kadaṁ
barābharaṇaṁ vairimadanivāraṇaṁ śrīsāmantagaruḍapādapaṁka
jabhramara nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahā
sāmaṁtaṁ manneyaṁ ghaṭṭiyarasar koṭṭigannūra manneyasā
myamaṁ pūvinapaḍaṁgiliya kalidēvasvāmidēvargge dhārā
pūrvaka(ṁ)māge biṭṭukoṭṭaṁ Ī dharmmamaṁ mahājanaṁ nūṟirppadiṁ
baruṁ pratipāḷisuvar . Ī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavargge vāraṇāsi
prayāge Arghyatīrtthaṁ kurukṣētrameṁbī puṇyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷ catu
rvvēdapālagarappa brāhmaṇargge sāsira kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷugumaṁ ponno
ḷaṁ paṁcaratnadoḷaṁ kaṭṭisiyubhayamukhigoṭṭa phalamakku Ī dharmma
manaḷidavanā tīrtthasthānadoḷ caturvvēdapālagarappa brāhmaṇa
ruma naiṣṭikatapōdhanarumaṁ sāsira kavileyuvanaḷida paṁ
camahāpātakara pōda gatige salvar . ślōka . sāmānyōyaṁ
dharmma(ṁ)sēturnnaipāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ
sarvānētān bhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyō
yācatē rāmabhadraḥ ©
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harētavasuṁdharāṁ śaṣṭirvvarṣasa
haśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ ©
Digital edition of SII 9.135 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
